title: Short title
doc_html:
PART II.  NATURAL AND SCENIC RIVERS SYSTEM

§1840.  Short title

This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Scenic Rivers Act".  

Acts 1988, No. 947, §1, eff. July 27, 1988.

PART II.  NATURAL AND SCENIC RIVERS SYSTEM
§1840.  Short title
